```{r setup, include= FALSE}
library(reticulate)
py_require(
  packages = c( "pytrends",
                "urllib3<2"),
  python_version = "3.12.*")
```

Create the request object class with proxies and such:
see [pytrends](https://pypi.org/project/pytrends/#api)
```{python}
from pytrends.request import TrendReq
pytrends = TrendReq(hl='en-US', tz=360)
# pytrends = TrendReq(hl='en-US', tz=360, timeout=(10,25), backoff_factor=0.1)   
```

Define the request and the properties
```{python}
kw_list = ["ciao", "immigrati"]
pytrends.build_payload(kw_list, timeframe='today 12-m', geo='IT')
```

Get the request
```{python}
ciao_it = pytrends.multirange_interest_over_time()
```

Read it in R
```{r}
ciao_it = py$ciao_it
ciao_it
```

convert it to a time_series
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
ciao_ts = ts(data = ciao_it$Ciao)
ggplot(ciao_it) + 
  geom_line(aes(x = 1:nrow(ciao_it), y = Ciao)) +
  theme_bw()
```
